title: funastrum torreyi
intro: Funastrum torreyi, also known as Torrey's funastrum or Devil's Claw, is a flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a perennial vine native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, with medicinal properties attributed to its roots. The roots of Funastrum torreyi contain iridoid glycosides, which have been used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, pain, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, can be made from the roots to utilize its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and supporting immune function.
